From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

English actor

| Mitch Hewer | |
| --- | --- |
| Hewer in 2007 | |
| Born | Mitchell Scott Hewer   (1989-07-01) 1 July 1989 (age 36)  [Bristol](/wiki/Bristol "Bristol"), England |
| Alma mater | [South West Academy of Dramatic Arts](/wiki/SWADA "SWADA") |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 2006–present |

**Mitchell Scott Hewer**[[1]](#cite_note-1) (born 1 July 1989) is an English actor, best known for the role of [Maxxie Oliver](/wiki/Maxxie_Oliver "Maxxie Oliver") in the [E4](/wiki/E4_(TV_channel) "E4 (TV channel)") [teen drama](/wiki/Teen_drama "Teen drama") *[Skins](/wiki/Skins_(British_TV_series) "Skins (British TV series)")*. He has also starred in *[Britannia High](/wiki/Britannia_High "Britannia High")* as the all-round talent [Danny Miller](/wiki/Danny_Miller_(Britannia_High_character) "Danny Miller (Britannia High character)").

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mitch_Hewer&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

In 2006, Hewer was cast as [Maxxie Oliver](/wiki/Maxxie_Oliver "Maxxie Oliver") in the teen drama, *[Skins](/wiki/Skins_(British_TV_series) "Skins (British TV series)")*. He appeared on the cover of the March and October 2007 issues of gay magazine *[Attitude](/wiki/Attitude_magazine "Attitude magazine")*, as part of a "Gays on TV" feature which included stars from *Skins*, *[Hollyoaks](/wiki/Hollyoaks "Hollyoaks")*, *[Coronation Street](/wiki/Coronation_Street "Coronation Street")* and *[Shameless](/wiki/Shameless_(British_TV_series) "Shameless (British TV series)")*.[[2]](#cite_note-2) He also appeared nude in the June 2008 issue of *[Cosmopolitan](/wiki/Cosmopolitan_(magazine) "Cosmopolitan (magazine)")* in aid of [testicular cancer](/wiki/Testicular_cancer "Testicular cancer") research.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

Hewer starred in the music drama *[Britannia High](/wiki/Britannia_High "Britannia High")*, in the role of [Danny Miller](/wiki/Danny_Miller_(Britannia_High_character) "Danny Miller (Britannia High character)"). He also appears on the *[Britannia High](/wiki/Britannia_High_(soundtrack) "Britannia High (soundtrack)")* soundtrack.[[5]](#cite_note-5) He also appeared on the popular [ITV](/wiki/ITV_(TV_network) "ITV (TV network)") and ITV2 shows *[Xtra Factor](/wiki/The_X_Factor_(UK)#The_Xtra_Factor "The X Factor (UK)")*, *[This Morning](/wiki/This_Morning_(TV_series) "This Morning (TV series)")*, *[Richard and Judy's New Position](/wiki/Richard_and_Judy%27s_New_Position "Richard and Judy's New Position")* and on the [BBC](/wiki/BBC "BBC") comedy show *[Never Mind the Buzzcocks](/wiki/Never_Mind_the_Buzzcocks "Never Mind the Buzzcocks")* alongside team captain [Davina McCall](/wiki/Davina_McCall "Davina McCall") and singer [Alesha Dixon](/wiki/Alesha_Dixon "Alesha Dixon").

In December 2009, Hewer appeared in the musical *[Never Forget](/wiki/Never_Forget_(musical) "Never Forget (musical)")*, based on the songs of boyband [Take That](/wiki/Take_That "Take That"). He played stripper Dirty Harry alongside [Michelle Collins](/wiki/Michelle_Collins "Michelle Collins"). The show took place at [Fairfield Halls](/wiki/Fairfield_Halls "Fairfield Halls") in [Croydon](/wiki/Croydon "Croydon"), London.[[6]](#cite_note-6)[[7]](#cite_note-7)

In 2014, he appeared as Ben in *[Nightlight](/wiki/Nightlight_(2015_film) "Nightlight (2015 film)")*[[8]](#cite_note-8) and as Steven Stevens in *[Behaving Badly](/wiki/Behaving_Badly_(film) "Behaving Badly (film)")*, the film adaptation of [Ric Browde](/wiki/Ric_Browde "Ric Browde")'s novel *[While I'm Dead Feed the Dog](/wiki/While_I%27m_Dead_Feed_the_Dog "While I'm Dead Feed the Dog")*.

Hewer joined the cast of *[Casualty](/wiki/Casualty_(TV_series) "Casualty (TV series)")* as Mickey Ellisson in 2017.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mitch_Hewer&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Personal life")]

Born in [Bristol](/wiki/Bristol "Bristol"), Hewer trained at [South West Academy of Dramatic Arts](/wiki/SWADA "SWADA").[[10]](#cite_note-swada-10) He appeared in the music video "The Club" by Lisa Morgan.[[11]](#cite_note-sidereel-11) He has a sister named Samantha and he has a daughter named Aria Isabella.
